This works! Tokens don't contain whitespace (including \n) since we split on whitespace.

import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let needle = "\n#{tok}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, needle)
    count = count + 1
    seen = "#{seen}#{tok}\n"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
